title: Gluss'elta Archipelago
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Gluss'elta Archipelago''', also known as the '''Gluss'elta Islands''', was an area on [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]] containing twelve islands and many rocky inlets that spanned four thousand kilometers of the [[Gluss'elta Sea|Gluss'elta sea]]. The islands were home to the [[Nikto/Legends|Pale Nikto]], and also served as hideouts for [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].
